displayTitle: Insider: The High Republic: Survivors of the Stormwall
synopsis: A Phase III short-story collection on life inside the Occlusion Zone after Starlight Beacon's destruction and the rise of Marchion Ro's Stormwall; follows the crew of the Republic Longbeam Aurie, lost in the Zone, while a Jedi Padawan searches for a route through the barrier.
title: Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Survivors of the Stormwall
